news.title:
Sterling & Wilson Renewable Energy faced a tax search in Mumbai over GST non-payment allegations.
Company operations remain unaffected; financial impact is unclear as of now.
news.summary:
Sterling & Wilson Renewable Energy faced a tax search in Mumbai over GST non-payment allegations.
Company operations remain unaffected; financial impact is unclear as of now.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd's subsidiary in Kazakhstan liquidated effective March 2, 2026.
The subsidiary had no business activity since inception; no financial or related party implications reported.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd's subsidiary in Kazakhstan liquidated effective March 2, 2026.
The subsidiary had no business activity since inception; no financial or related party implications reported.

news.title:
Sterling & Wilson Renewable Energy faces tax disallowance for FY 2019-20, totaling ₹62.9L.
Penalty of ₹20.3L imposed; company evaluating the order and planning steps.
news.summary:
Sterling & Wilson Renewable Energy faces tax disallowance for FY 2019-20, totaling ₹62.9L.
Penalty of ₹20.3L imposed; company evaluating the order and planning steps.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd granted 21,48,822 ESOPs under two plans at Rs. 172, a 15% discount to NSE price.
The ESOPs vest within 1-3 years, with a 4-year exercise period; limits increased for ESOP Plan II 2025.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd granted 21,48,822 ESOPs under two plans at Rs. 172, a 15% discount to NSE price.
The ESOPs vest within 1-3 years, with a 4-year exercise period; limits increased for ESOP Plan II 2025.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy received Rs. 143.1 crore indemnity from Shapoorji Pallonji.
Payment completed on Jan 31, 2026, linked to Nov 29, 2025 disclosure.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy received Rs. 143.1 crore indemnity from Shapoorji Pallonji.
Payment completed on Jan 31, 2026, linked to Nov 29, 2025 disclosure.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd received an order from CGST Bhuj to recover Rs. 1.85 Cr plus interest and penalty.
The company is evaluating the order and plans to file an appeal. No material impact on operations is expected.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd received an order from CGST Bhuj to recover Rs. 1.85 Cr plus interest and penalty.
The company is evaluating the order and plans to file an appeal. No material impact on operations is expected.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd reported strong Q3 FY26 earnings, achieving a revenue of INR 2,092 crores, a 48% YoY growth. Order inflows reached INR 6,929 crores YTD, with FY26 guidance exceeding INR 11,000 crores.
Key wins include a INR 1,381 crore order from Adani Green for solar projects and a 790 MWh BESS project. Challenges include fluctuating gross margins (9.5% in Q3) and legal expenses affecting profitability.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd reported strong Q3 FY26 earnings, achieving a revenue of INR 2,092 crores, a 48% YoY growth. Order inflows reached INR 6,929 crores YTD, with FY26 guidance exceeding INR 11,000 crores.
Key wins include a INR 1,381 crore order from Adani Green for solar projects and a 790 MWh BESS project. Challenges include fluctuating gross margins (9.5% in Q3) and legal expenses affecting profitability.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy expects 15-20% revenue growth for FY27.
The projection was shared during the company's conference call update.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy expects 15-20% revenue growth for FY27.
The projection was shared during the company's conference call update.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy expects a minimum 1GW order annually from Adani Group.
The expectation was disclosed during the company's management concall update.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy expects a minimum 1GW order annually from Adani Group.
The expectation was disclosed during the company's management concall update.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy excludes potential Reliance orders from new inflow expectations despite ongoing discussions.
The anticipated Reliance order, if secured, will add to their already increased guidance.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy excludes potential Reliance orders from new inflow expectations despite ongoing discussions.
The anticipated Reliance order, if secured, will add to their already increased guidance.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy raised order inflow guidance to ₹11,000+ crores for FY.
This highlights strong demand in the renewable energy sector per concall updates.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy raised order inflow guidance to ₹11,000+ crores for FY.
This highlights strong demand in the renewable energy sector per concall updates.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy released Q3 9M FY26 unaudited results.
The company highlighted expertise in solar EPC, O&M, and energy storage solutions.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy released Q3 9M FY26 unaudited results.
The company highlighted expertise in solar EPC, O&M, and energy storage solutions.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy posted a Q3 net loss of 28M INR, improved from 148M INR YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to 20.9B INR, compared to 18.3B INR in the same period last year.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy posted a Q3 net loss of 28M INR, improved from 148M INR YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to 20.9B INR, compared to 18.3B INR in the same period last year.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
The board also appointed Mr. Rajesh Mittal as Senior VP-IT, effective Jan 20, 2026.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
The board also appointed Mr. Rajesh Mittal as Senior VP-IT, effective Jan 20, 2026.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd's board to meet on Jan 15, 2026, for Q3 and 9-month financial results.
Trading window remains closed till 48 hours after results, per insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd's board to meet on Jan 15, 2026, for Q3 and 9-month financial results.
Trading window remains closed till 48 hours after results, per insider trading regulations.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd received an order from GST authorities for tax mismatch and shortfall of INR 11.79 Cr for FY2021-22.
The issue is partially covered under an indemnity agreement, and the company is evaluating further actions.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd received an order from GST authorities for tax mismatch and shortfall of INR 11.79 Cr for FY2021-22.
The issue is partially covered under an indemnity agreement, and the company is evaluating further actions.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy faces INR 95.2 lakh input tax mismatch for Apr 2018-Mar 2020.
The amount excludes penalty and interest and is covered under indemnity with Reliance and others.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy faces INR 95.2 lakh input tax mismatch for Apr 2018-Mar 2020.
The amount excludes penalty and interest and is covered under indemnity with Reliance and others.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd and OEG Inc. mutually dismissed arbitration with prejudice.
No costs or legal fees were awarded; financial impact aligns with prior disclosures.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd and OEG Inc. mutually dismissed arbitration with prejudice.
No costs or legal fees were awarded; financial impact aligns with prior disclosures.

news.title:
GST authority issued INR 2.96 Cr tax shortfall order against Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy.
Period April 2018-March 2023 covered; indemnity by Reliance New Energy, Shapoorji Pallonji, and Mr. Daruvala.
news.summary:
GST authority issued INR 2.96 Cr tax shortfall order against Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy.
Period April 2018-March 2023 covered; indemnity by Reliance New Energy, Shapoorji Pallonji, and Mr. Daruvala.

news.title:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy's credit rating was updated by Infomerics, reaffirming some ratings and revising others.
Long-term bank facilities saw a rating upgrade to IVR BBB- Negative; short-term facilities improved to IVR A2.
news.summary:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy's credit rating was updated by Infomerics, reaffirming some ratings and revising others.
Long-term bank facilities saw a rating upgrade to IVR BBB- Negative; short-term facilities improved to IVR A2.
